docket_entries.description: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT COLMENARES, DAISY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-06-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-04-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2020 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-27-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, JUDGE GERARDO C. SANDOVAL, FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. KERI SALET, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAISY COLMENARES AT TRIAL CALL, THEREFORE THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL DATE AND SET A DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING FOR 07/27/20 IN DEPT. 514 AT 9:30AM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-27-2020 FOR SHORT CAUSE TRIAL/PROVE-UP HEARING - CONTINUED TO SEP-14-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN 514. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. OR DEFENDANT DAISY COLMENARES, BUT THE CLERK IN DEPARTMENT 514 DID SPEAK WITH A REPRESENTATIVE FROM PLAINTIFF'S OFFICE THIS MORNING REGARDING CONTINUING THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE DEFENDANT(S) WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
